notebooksPath.description:
BookxNotePro的笔记数据目录
🔴注意路径符号需要转义

copyBookxnoteImageToObsidian.description:
是否复制Bookxnote的图片到Obsidian库内
🔴注意路径符号需要转义
🍀注：如果图片本身就存在于库内就可以关闭该选项

notebooksImagesPath.description: Obsidian文件夹，用于存放Bookxnote复制过来的标注图片，请用相对于库的路径

Eagle Images Path.description: Obsidian库内存放Eagle的图片的相对路径，比如：900【素材】Assets/EagleAssets

Eagle→Excalidraw Tag.description: Eagle导入Excalidraw时，Eagle对应项目自动添加的标签

Don't stop Eagle→Excalidraw.description: 直接启动Eagle→Excalidraw模式，不要询问我为什么。

ocrModel.description: 选择 OCR 模型，有本地的 Paddleocr(需要本地文件)、Obsidian 的 Text Extractor 插件 API

PaddleocrPath.description: 选择 paddlleocr 文件夹路径下的 PaddleocrToJson.py 文件

动态Kanban.md的路径.description:
用于存放Frame的Kanban文件的存储路径
ob的路径，如：Excalidraw/Excalidraw.Kanban.md

缩略图是否带连接.description: 如带连接，则单击缩略图即可跳转

Curve length.description: 思维导图线条中弧线部分的长度

Length between element and line.description: 连接尾部和思维导图连接元素之间的距离

OpenSelectImage.description: 其他默认图片编辑软件的系统绝对路径，以换行分隔

QuickerInsertZKCardPath.description:
TimeStampNote的存放路径(相对路径)
eg：D-每日生活记录/QuickNotes
空值：默认为当前笔记路径

QuickerInsertZKCardTemplate.description:
TimeStampNote默认名称，若为存储路径用/隔开
eg：YYYYMM/YYYYMMDDHHMMSS

Default Insert Type.description:
Card(图标类型卡片)、Frame(嵌入式Frame)、Link(笔记链接)、Image(SVG图片)
无：ESC或回车退出，其他类型则直接创建

ocrModel2.description: 选择 OCR 模型，有本地的 Paddleocr(需要本地文件)、Obsidian 的 Text Extractor 插件 API

PaddleocrPath.description: 选择 paddlleocr 文件夹路径下的 PaddleocrToJson.py 文件

Zotero Images Path.description: Obsidian库内存放Zotero的图片的相对路径，比如：Y-图形文件存储/ZoteroImages

Zotero Annotations Color.description:
是否开启匹配Zotero的颜色选项栏
❗注：匹配颜色选项需要修改Zotero的高亮标注模板

animationGapMs.description: 动画过程中的播放的间隙(ms)

playTextFormat.description:
字母(letter)、单词(word)、整段(paragraph)的播放文字
推荐使用单词(word)的模式

Gap.description: The value of the gap between the connection line and the element, which must be greater than 0. If you want the connector to be next to the element, set it to 1.

fontFamily.value:
庞中华硬笔字体.ttf
流畅书写体.ttf

MindMap Format.description: This is prepared for the namespace of MindMap Format and does not need to be modified

curve length.description: The length of the curve part in the mind map line

length between element and line.description: The distance between the tail of the connection and the connecting elements of the mind map

Zotero Images Path.description: Obsidian库内存放Zotero的图片的相对路径，比如：Y-图形文件存储/ZoteroImages

Zotero Annotations Color.description:
是否开启匹配Zotero的颜色选项栏
❗注：匹配颜色选项需要修改Zotero的高亮标注模板

Output Base Folder.description: Base folder for storing generated files. Always use forward slash '/' for paths. Example: 'Excalidraw-Image-Occlusions', 'Cards/Image-Occlusions'

Card Location.description: Where to save card files ('default' for same folder as images, or 'choose' for custom location)

Default Card Path.description: Default path for card files when 'Card Location' is set to 'default'. Always use forward slash '/' for paths. Examples: 'flashcard/Anki', 'My Notes/Cards/Occlusion'. Leave empty to save with images

Default Template.description: Default template file path relative to template folder (e.g., 'Anki/Image Occlusion.md'). Leave empty to select template each time

Card File Prefix.description: Prefix for generated card files. Must be a valid filename without dots. Examples: 'anki - ', 'card ', 'io - '. Leave empty for no prefix

Card File Suffix.description: Suffix for generated card files (before .md). Examples: ' -card.card3' will generate 'prefix-timestamp-card.card3.md'. Leave empty for no suffix

Image Quality.description: Export scale for image quality (e.g., 1.5). Higher values mean better quality but larger files. Must be a valid number.

Hide All, Guess One - Highlight Color.description: Color used to highlight the target mask in 'Hide All, Guess One' mode (e.g., #ffd700 for gold, #ff0000 for red)

Generate Images No Matter What.description: Always generate images even when template selection is cancelled (yes/no)

Palette folder.description: The path to the folder where you store the Excalidraw Palettes

Light-gray.description: Base light-gray used for mixing with the accent color to generate the palette light-gray

Dark-gray.description: Base dark-gray used for mixing with the accent color to generate the palette dark-gray

Layout Options JSON.description: You can use layout options to configure the layout algorithm. A list of all options and further details of their exact effects is available in ELK's documentation.

Line shape.description: 连接线形状：curve 或 straight

Horizontal gap.description: 父子 frame 的水平距离

Vertical gap.description: 兄弟 frame 的垂直间距

Curve control length.description: 曲线中段的横向偏移长度

Line end gap.description: 曲线第二段的水平长度

Start arrowhead.description: 起点箭头：留空 / arrow / triangle / bar / dot

End arrowhead.description: 终点箭头：留空 / arrow / triangle / bar / dot

Zoom level.description: 点击列表条目时的缩放级别

Delete confirm.description: 删除整棵子树前是否弹出确认

Arrow vertical nudge.description: 连线末端轻微弯曲修正

Curve length.description: 思维导图线条中弧线部分的长度

Length between element and line.description: 连接尾部和思维导图连接元素之间的距离

pinnedScripts: 700【模板】Template/Excalidraw/Scripts/Downloaded/Copy Selected Element Styles to Global.md
